page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 4 dedicated physical cores, providing 4 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance type.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers a balanced hardware profile suitable for general-purpose workloads. Because the CPU cores are dedicated and do not share threads, this instance provides predictable compute performance. It is suited for applications such as mid-tier web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and development environments that require consistent CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, running at 3.2 GHz. The configuration includes 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio to ensure dedicated, non-hyperthreaded compute resources. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile make it highly suitable for workloads requiring consistent performance, such as application servers, containerized microservices, and general-purpose business applications.
